## Scope

- [ ] Feature or behavior change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] UI-only change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Packaging or release

## Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev`
- [ ] `npm run security:audit`
- [ ] `git diff --check`

## Release Impact

- [ ] No installer rebuild needed
- [ ] Rebuild macOS DMG
- [ ] Rebuild Windows installer
- [ ] Update SHA256
- [ ] Update release notes
